compiled_state.title: Post-migration test & CI quality hardening
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Context
With the bash→Python strangler-fig migration complete (story adult-oxide-slave; E7-final deleted the bash engine at e3507895, rebar is one Python implementation behind three facades), the test suite and CI need a quality pass. The suite grew incrementally across the migration (characterize→port→parity), so it carries change-detector tests, uneven 3-interface coverage, and ad-hoc organization. CI lint is also currently RED on main (pre-existing acli.py F811) and lint/format/test wiring needs to be made reliable.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Recommended ruff lint + format config adopted; lint + format-check + full test suite all gate in CI and run locally (consistency + reliability)
- [ ] Mutation testing run; change-detector (assertion-free / tautological) tests identified and pruned
- [ ] Full coverage of behaviors, integrations, and contracts (internal + external) across ALL three interfaces — MCP, CLI, library
- [ ] Tests organized along logical seams: each test file manageable; each directory 6–12 files (hard cap 24); subdirectories along seams for discoverability; all green locally AND in CI; test isolation maintained
- [ ] Opus SDET-primed review loop run until zero important/critical findings remain (remediating each round)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All five child tasks closed
- [ ] CI is green (lint + format + full suite) on a clean checkout
- [ ] A final SDET review reports no important/critical findings

## Sequencing
CI/lint/format foundation first (so reorg + coverage work is verifiable in CI), then mutation-prune, then coverage gaps, then reorg along seams, then the SDET review loop as the closing gate.

comments.body:
=== SESSION HANDOFF (post-migration hardening) ===
PUSHED: origin/main @ a713b76c (local == origin, clean tree). The bash->Python migration is COMPLETE and closed (adult-oxide-slave / lad-cipher-arena / nervy-hold-dip all closed; rebar is one Python implementation behind three facades, zero bash dependency).

THIS EPIC (mean-axe-feign) — 5 child tasks:
- (a) 5ab2 CI/lint/format — DONE/CLOSED. The full recommended ruff set [E,F,W,I,UP,B] now GATES with zero violations; ruff format applied + 'ruff format --check' gates in CI; the integration tier ('pytest -m integration') is wired into CI; bash/jq de-staled from the workflow. (Commits 89f5c7de, 7480964c, e31d4dd2, 670957ac.)
- (b) 4168-c28e-6505-406d Mutation testing — OPEN. Stand up mutmut or cosmic-ray over src/rebar core; record a baseline mutation score; identify + prune change-detector tests (assertion-light / tautological / implementation-pinned); kill high-value surviving mutants.
- (c) e143-31fd-bf2f-458e Full 3-interface coverage — OPEN. Map behaviors/integrations/contracts (internal + external) x {MCP, CLI, lib}; close gaps; external contracts = Jira reconciler bidirectional field round-trips (LIVE DIG authorized: bridge-probe / reconcile dry-run are non-destructive) + MCP outputSchema for every advertised command. INCLUDES roam-crone-disco (60a0-3aee-98e8-4094): author + register output schemas for sign / verify-signature (--output json) and remove the _OUTPUT_SCHEMA_GAPS exclusion in tests/interfaces/test_schema_coverage.py.
- (d) cf14-d845-075a-4f74 Test reorg along seams — OPEN. Each test file manageable; each directory 6-12 files (HARD CAP 24); subdirectories along logical seams; green locally + CI; maintain test isolation (verify order-independence).
- (e) 6623-726e-980e-4ace Opus SDET review loop — OPEN. Prime an opus subagent as an SDET; review the testing; remediate important/critical findings; REPEAT until none remain.

STATE / ENV: full non-integration suite 1688 passed/0 failed; integration 8 passed; ruff check (full set) + ruff format --check clean. Dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev; always a fixed --basetemp (macOS tmp race). DON'T git-commit while a background full-suite runs (trips _no_repo_commits). CI = .github/workflows/test.yml (lint job: ruff check + ruff format --check + mypy core gating; test job: broad + integration matrix).

PATTERN (worked well): use an opus subagent to IMPLEMENT a bounded sub-task (it runs the suite) and a SEPARATE opus subagent to REVIEW completed changes; inspect agent output + independently verify (suite + ruff + live DIG for Jira-touching changes) before committing. characterize->change->test-green->commit; full pytest green before each next step. Docs reflect CURRENT state (no migration-narration: surviving/retired/Tier E/no longer). Track all work in rebar; create+link discovered_from for emergent work. Commit to main directly; push when the user directs.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== PROGRESS (loop iteration 2026-06-15T03:32Z) ===
CLOSED this iteration (both committed + PUSHED to origin/main):
- (b) 4168-c28e-6505-406d Mutation testing — DONE. mutmut 3.6.0 wired ([tool.mutmut] config, docs/mutation-testing.md baseline). next_batch.py 62.7%->99.2% mapped score (survivors 236->6); reducer/_processors.py 97.3%->99.4%. Rewrote 1 assertion-light test; added test_next_batch_behavior.py + test_reducer_record_fields.py. Commit 369d82ea.
- roam-crone-disco 60a0-3aee-98e8-4094 (sub-piece of c) — DONE. sign_result + verify_signature_result schemas registered; --output json validation tests; _OUTPUT_SCHEMA_GAPS exclusion removed. Commit 72455f08.

REMAINING task (c) e143-31fd-bf2f-458e (claim it, then tackle in pieces):
  1. MCP outputSchema audit: confirm EVERY advertised MCP command that returns structured data advertises an outputSchema (now incl. sign/verify if exposed); add coverage test.
  2. Jira reconciler bidirectional field round-trips — LIVE DIG authorized (bridge-probe / reconcile dry-run are NON-destructive). Verify field mappings round-trip both directions.
  3. Internal contracts across CLI+lib+MCP: exit-10 optimistic-concurrency, lock discipline, deterministic replay.
  4. Behavior x interface coverage matrix DOC + coverage.py measurement with a recorded target.
THEN: (d) cf14-d845-075a-4f74 test reorg along seams (note: tests/interfaces has 42 files, over the 24 cap — reorg target); (e) 6623-726e-980e-4ace opus SDET review loop; then close epic.

ENV: dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev, fixed --basetemp=/tmp/rebar-pytest. Broad suite 1751 passed / integration 8. ruff clean. AUTO-PUSH on ticket close is now standing policy (user-directed); each loop fire FIRST checks main CI (gh run list) and fixes red before feature work.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== PROGRESS (loop iteration 2, 2026-06-15) ===
CLOSED this iteration (all committed + PUSHED; origin/main @ bdcbbd26):
- (c) e143-31fd-bf2f-458e Full 3-interface coverage — DONE. Gap analysis -> closed G1 (MCP sign/verify typed output + canonical schemas + TOTAL-partition completeness guard), G2 (MCP transition/claim concurrency-error identity), G3 (7 Jira bidirectional field round-trips: description ADF / blocked+cancelled status-label / label / parent / comment echo, chaining real pure differs; + gated live reconcile dry-run smoke, verified live 38s), G5 (lib+MCP reopen concurrency), G6 (61% coverage baseline + fail_under=50 + behavior x interface matrix in docs/coverage.md). Strengthened tautological deps-parity assertion. Commit bdcbbd26.
- DISCOVERED (G4): story 25ae-92e6-2927-49b6 'Implement Jira reconciler link/relation sync' — link sync is an UNIMPLEMENTED capability (OutboundMutation.links always []); scoped OUT of (c) AC, linked discovered_from e143. Future work, NOT part of this epic's closure.

REMAINING (in order):
- (d) cf14-d845-075a-4f74 Test reorg along seams. HARD CAP 24 files/dir; target 6-12. CURRENT over-cap offender: tests/interfaces has 42 .py files (must split into subdirs along logical seams: schema/contract, parity, mcp, concurrency/exit-codes, etc.). Verify green locally + CI; MAINTAIN test isolation (run with pytest-randomly / -p no:randomly cross-check order-independence). Watch for path-loaded reconciler tests (spec_from_file_location) and conftest scoping when moving files.
- (e) 6623-726e-980e-4ace Opus SDET review loop — prime opus subagent as SDET, review testing, remediate important/critical, REPEAT until none. Then CLOSE THE EPIC (all other children then closed: a,b,c done; d pending).

ENV: dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev; fixed --basetemp (use distinct basetemps for parallel agents). Suite: broad 1759 passed / integration 15 passed / 1 live external (gated). ruff clean. AUTO-PUSH on ticket close is standing policy; each fire FIRST checks main CI (gh run list) + fixes red before feature work. Pattern that works: opus implementer(s) over DISJOINT file sets in parallel + separate opus reviewer per change; independently verify (suite+ruff+live bridge-probe for Jira changes) before commit.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: SCOPE UPDATE (user-directed, 2026-06-15): story 25ae-92e6-2927-49b6 'Implement Jira reconciler link/relation sync' is now a CHILD of this epic (reparented from discovered_from). Empirical verification (task 2b45, closed) proved link sync was never wired (NOT a migration regression — reconciler always Python; inert since upstream extraction b534f47a) and the link client primitives are broken live (set_relationship passes --json rejected by ACLI; get_issue_links parses wrong shape). TDD specs landed as xfail(strict) in tests/{integration/rebar_reconciler/test_link_sync.py, external/test_link_sync_live.py}. Epic now closes when a,b,c (done) + d (in progress) + e + 25ae are all closed. Sequencing: finish (d) test reorg, then implement 25ae link sync (green-up the TDD xfails), then (e) SDET review loop as the closing gate.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== EPIC COMPLETE ===
All children closed: (a) 5ab2 CI/lint/format; (b) 4168 mutation testing; (c) e143 full 3-interface coverage (+ roam-crone-disco sign/verify schemas); (d) cf14 test reorg along seams; 25ae Jira link/relation sync (implemented end-to-end + live-validated); (e) 6623 Opus SDET review loop (round 2 gate PASSES — zero important/critical findings).
AC MET: all children closed; CI green on a clean checkout (d3478fbe — all matrix jobs + lint); final SDET review reports no important/critical findings.
DISCOVERED WORK left open (NOT epic-blocking, tracked): d843 was implemented+closed (acli subprocess timeout/process-group reap + link write-safety); 4a48 external-test-leak fixed+closed; remaining open: c16f (network-git timeouts), 8874 (reducer UUID-vs-filename tie-break doc mismatch), 25ae's bendy-titan follow-ups n/a. The test suite grew to broad 1812 + integration 19; ruff/mypy-core gating; external tier confined behind REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL + credential-scoped CI.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
